case_title: LI-HAN LI VS. RIWEN CHEN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, RIWEN LIU, PEIZHEN INDIVIIDUALLY AND DBA SUNSHINE CONSUMER GOODS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LI-HAN SERVED NOV-22-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, PEIZHEN INDIVIIDUALLY AND DBA SUNSHINE CONSUMER GOODS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LI-HAN SERVED NOV-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, RIWEN

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $66.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LI-HAN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LI-HAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, RIWEN LIU, PEIZHEN INDIVIIDUALLY AND DBA SUNSHINE CONSUMER GOODS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, LI-HAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, RIWEN LIU, PEIZHEN INDIVIIDUALLY AND DBA SUNSHINE CONSUMER GOODS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4519 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LI-HAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, RIWEN LIU, PEIZHEN INDIVIIDUALLY AND DBA SUNSHINE CONSUMER GOODS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
